objectives.text: Talk to the Wounded Man, loot chests, equip items + skills
Kill The Bloated Miller, enter Clearfell Encampment behind him
Talk to Farrow, accept his first rune quest
notes: 0.5 league NPC — unlocks Verisium Runeforging (Runic Ward on armour)

objectives.text: Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack
notes: Always north/northeast of waypoint
Waypoint sits next to Mud Burrow; bridge onward leads to The Grelwood
After the kill, talk to Renly in town for a Level 1 Support Gem

objectives.text: Loot the Abandoned Stash in the Mysterious Campsite

notes: Somewhat in center of zone

objectives.text: Scout exits to Grim Tangle and The Red Vale
notes: Enter each, take the waypoint, then backtrack to Grelwood
Cauldron gives a medium life + mana flask
Hardest early fight — frost bomb chills her

objectives.text: Find the 3 Obelisks of Rust, loot a Runed Girdle from each
Kill The Rust King (spawns on the last obelisk)
notes: Kite mobs under his feet for AoE uptime

objectives.text: Talk to Renly, get the Runed Spikes
Talk to Una, then TP back to town
Talk to Una in town, then TP to Grim Tangle
Find the exit to the Cemetery of the Eternals
notes: Farrow's 2nd rune quest: follow mushrooms toward the Druid, caskets toward the Cemetery

objectives.text: Enter the Cemetery of the Eternals
Mausoleum of the Praetor → kill Draven, loot Key Piece
notes: Do Draven first, then refresh the zone before Asinia so her drops scale up
Find the hidden switch to open it

objectives.text: Tomb of the Consort → kill Asinia, loot Key Piece
Open the Memorial Gate, kill Lachlann, loot ring
Exit to Hunting Grounds (take waypoint), then TP to town
Talk to Finn, Una, and The Hooded One
notes: The Hooded One revives on return — Identify is now available

objectives.text: Talk to Farrow (3rd rune quest), then Delwyn further in

notes: Crowbells leave blood trails leading to the boss
Watch slam attacks — can one-shot; boss flees at low HP

objectives.text: Scout exits to Freythorn and Ogham Farmlands
notes: Enter each, take the waypoint, then return
Follow the trail of locusts toward Freythorn afterward
The big altar's smoke tendrils point to the small altars

objectives.text: Big Ritual Altar → kill The King in the Mists
notes: Phase 2: dodge totem summons and curses

objectives.text: Una's Lute Box in the house near the checkpoint → Una's Lute
notes: Deliver to Una in town for the reward; also the final step of Farrow's rune quest

objectives.text: Find the Smithing Tools in the house
notes: Only needed on first character per league; follow the cobble road

objectives.text: Blacksmith's Chest in the same house

notes: Fight is mostly in the north of the village

objectives.text: Upstairs → lever → talk to Leitis, enter The Manor Ramparts
Rope on the hanging man near the checkpoint

notes: Confirm a Lvl 10 flask + Lvl 11 chest piece first — much safer
Usually after the first walkway when you see the Count; drops Essence + double-res belt
Each floor heads the opposite direction from the floor above
Phase 2: dodge roll under his sword; frost bomb chills him

objectives.text: Talk to The Hooded One → "Follow the Beast's Trail" to go to Act 2
